query: Historical first-round vote shares of Zambian presidential elections 2011, 2015, 2016, 2021 for incumbents and winners, and accuracy of Zambian pre-election opinion polls versus actual results
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

## Zambian Presidential Elections — First-Round Vote Shares & Poll Accuracy

**First-round vote shares (winner / incumbent):**
- **2011** (plurality): Michael Sata (challenger) won ~42.98%; incumbent Rupiah Banda **lost** at ~36%
- **2015** by-election (plurality): Edgar Lungu won 48.33% vs Hichilema 46.67% — margin just **1.68%** (27,757 votes)
- **2016** (first 50%+1 election): incumbent Lungu **re-elected** with 50.35%, barely clearing threshold, vs Hichilema 47.63%
- **2021**: Hichilema (challenger) won a **landslide 59.02%**; incumbent Lungu **lost** at 38.71%

**Key base-rate patterns:**
- Both recent sitting presidents who ran (Banda 2011, Lungu 2021) **lost outright**.
- Lungu's share collapsed ~11.6 pts from 2016→2021 amid economic crisis.
- Outcomes oscillate between razor-thin (2015, 2016) and decisive (2021).

**Pre-election poll accuracy (2021):** Poor and divergent. Government-aligned polls badly over-stated the incumbent:
- PSAZ poll: predicted Lungu 40.4% / Hichilema 30.33% (understated the actual winner by ~29 pts; condemned as flawed/biased)
- "Zambia Decides": predicted a Lungu 56% landslide — completely inverted
- Afrobarometer (most credible): gave no headline winner but flagged declining PF support and a large 45.6% undeclared bloc that broke heavily to Hichilema (a hidden anti-incumbent vote)

The full report, structured data points, and sources have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: 2021 Zambian general election
sources.snippet: Hakainde Hichilema (UPND) elected president, defeating incumbent Edgar Lungu (PF); Lungu conceded 16 August.

sources.snippet: PSAZ predicted ECL 40.4%/HH 30.33%; Zambia Decides predicted ECL 56%; actual HH 59.02% (2,852,348) vs ECL 38.71% (1,870,780).

sources.title: Two surveys, two wildly different predictions for Zambia's election
sources.snippet: PSAZ poll gave Lungu 44.5% / Hichilema 30.3%; Afrobarometer Dec 2020 gave PF 22.9% / UPND 25.2% with 45.6% DK; PSAZ criticized as flawed/pro-government.
